name: Enabling Trackable on a part changes how its stock items are handled
steps:
Given a part 'PCB Rev A' is not marked as Trackable
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'PCB Rev A'
When the user edits the part and checks the 'Trackable' checkbox
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the part 'PCB Rev A' is now Trackable and any new stock items created for it will require a serial or batch number

name: Mark a part as Trackable requires serial or batch number on all stock items
steps:
Given a part 'Sensor Module' is marked as Trackable
Given a user with stock create permission is logged in
When the user attempts to create a new stock item for 'Sensor Module' without providing a serial number or batch number
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the system rejects the submission with a validation error requiring a batch number or serial number for the trackable part
